fields.value: Tasks that previously required weeks of manual effort can be handled by an agent
developers can leverage agent skills through an agent to handle these tasks automatically
memory costs remain a real constraint in production deployments

value: NVIDIA Metropolis Blueprint for Video Search and Summarization

evidence.quote: enabling easy development of secure, agentic AI applications for robotics, industrial automation, and edge AI systems.
Tasks that previously required weeks of manual effort can be handled by an agent, reducing time to market for custom Jetson designs.
Rather than manually configuring each step of the development process, developers can leverage agent skills through an agent to handle these tasks automatically.
NVIDIA JetPack 7.2 directly supports one-command deployment of NVIDIA NemoClaw
developers can leverage agent skills through an agent to handle these tasks automatically
As agentic AI moves to the edge and memory costs remain a real constraint in production deployments, this release directly addresses both.
NVIDIA is also introducing skills that help agents build vision pipelines using NVIDIA DeepStream and NVIDIA Metropolis Blueprint for Video Search and Summarization (VSS).
These skills cover model benchmarking, inference optimization, and Jetson diagnostics.
NVIDIA JetPack 7.2 directly supports one-command deployment of NVIDIA NemoClaw , an open source stack that adds privacy and security controls to OpenClaw.
Together, these updates help developers get more out of existing Jetson hardware, accelerate time to market, and lower total cost of ownership.

fields.value: Rather than being a contact centre platform that added AI, or an AI model provider that added customer service
management layer for deploying, testing, and optimising AI agents across whatever infrastructure an enterprise already runs
430 people across offices in New York, Berlin, Munich, and London

value: surpassed $50 million in annual recurring revenue

evidence.quote: Parloa, the Berlin-founded AI agent management platform, has announced a wave of strategic partnerships with SAP, Microsoft, OpenAI, Five9, and Epic
The company, which builds AI agents for enterprise customer service, has also surpassed $50 million in annual recurring revenue

Rather than being a contact centre platform that added AI, or an AI model provider that added customer service, Parloa positions itself as the management layer for deploying, testing, and optimising AI agents across whatever infrastructure an enterprise already runs.
Parloa positions itself as the management layer for deploying, testing, and optimising AI agents across whatever infrastructure an enterprise already runs.
The company now employs reportedly 430 people across offices in New York, Berlin, Munich, and London.

The company has also signed partnerships with Five9, the cloud contact centre provider, and Epic, the healthcare software company, to bring HIPAA-ready AI agents into clinical and patient support workflows.
The company, which builds AI agents for enterprise customer service, has also surpassed $50 million in annual recurring revenue with 150% net revenue retention, according to its latest update.
